name: Steamed Fish and Spinach
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Pkg frozen fish fillets, thawed and well drained
10 oz Pkg frozen green or sweet red pepper
recipeInstructions:
thawed and well drained
cut into thin strips
1. Cut the block of fish crosswise into 4 equal pieces.
2. In a small skillet, cook onion and garlic in hot oil until tender. Remove from heat.
3. Stir in wine, tarragon or basil, salt, and pepper. Return to heat and boil gently about 2 minutes or until most of the liquid has evaporated. Remove skillet from heat and set aside.
4. Place 1/8 of the spinach on four 12x18-inch pieces of heavy foil.
5. Place 1 portion of fish on each portion of spinach.
6. Spoon onion mixture evenly over fish.
7. Top with remaining spinach and the green pepper strips.
8. Bring up long edges of foil and, leaving a little space for steam expansion, seal tightly with a double fold.
9. Fold short ends to seal.
10. Grill foil packets, seam side up, directly over medium coals about 20 minutes or until fish flakes easily when tested with a fork. Turn packets over twice.
